name: Velvet Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the crumbs, 3/4 cup sugar, and margarine; press mixture firmly onto bottom and side of a 9-inch pie plate. Set aside.
3. Melt 3 squares chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese and remaining sugar until creamy. Beat in 1/2 cup sour cream and eggs until smooth. Blend in melted chocolate and vanilla extract.
5. Pour filling into prepared crust; bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until slightly puffed and center is set.
6. Blend remaining sour cream and brown sugar; spread over cheesecake. Bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Cool cheesecake to room temperature. Melt remaining chocolate and drizzle over cheesecake. Chill for at least 4 hours.
